name: Chicken Salad Delight
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Medium Pearled Barley - Quaker Scotch Brand
2 cups Halved seedless grapes - red or green
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil; stir in barley, bouillon granules, and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
2. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 50 to 60 minutes, or until tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Drain and cool the cooked barley mixture.
4. Combine cooked barley, chicken, grapes, celery, and walnuts in a large bowl.
5. In a separate small bowl, mix remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt with remaining ingredients (mayonnaise, milk or water, curry powder).
6. Pour the dressing over the barley mixture and toss lightly to combine.
7. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
8. Serve chilled in cantaloupe halves or on lettuce leaves, if desired.
Seven 1 Cup Servings
NOTE: To substitute 2/3 cup Quaker Scotch Brand Quick Pearled Barley, decrease water to 2 cups and cooking time to 10 to 12 minutes. Proceed as directed in the recipe.
NUTRITIONAL ANALYSIS per serving:
calories 351
carbohydrates 21 g
protein 15 g
fat 23 g
calcium 33 mg
sodium 380 mg
cholesterol 50 mg
dietary fiber 3 g
